## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential co-marketing opportunities between Temporal.io and GrowthX AI, focusing on GrowthX's use of Temporal as their runtime layer for AI-powered content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI uses Temporal as the runtime layer for their AI-powered content creation workflows, enabling complex, scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in co-marketing, with a focus on a technical case study highlighting GrowthX's unique use of Temporal](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing, processing over 20 million words monthly for clients and planning to hire 35 engineers this year](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [The co-marketing effort will target developers and showcase Temporal's capabilities in AI workflow orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes complex AI workflows with 200+ steps per content piece](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Leverages Temporal as the runtime layer for orchestration and execution](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Processes hundreds of thousands of tokens per content piece](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Incorporates human editors for quality control and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Achieves rapid content production at scale (20M+ words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Temporal's Role in GrowthX AI's Stack

  - [Critical for handling API failures, retries, and parallel processing](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Enables long-running workflows and scales to meet high-volume demands](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Integrated into GrowthX's custom framework for AI agent interactions](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Powers visual workflow representations while executing via Temporal's API](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Co-Marketing Opportunities

  - [Blog post/case study showcasing GrowthX's use of Temporal](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Potential webinar to dive deeper into the technical implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Focus on developer audience and Temporal's capabilities in AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Balance between showcasing technology and protecting GrowthX's IP](https://fathom.video/share/Gf-W1DymM8jeheS9cau5ztd1fEkWWoqU?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Next Steps for Co-Marketing

1.  Lauren to send guiding questions and ideal angles for the case study
2.  GrowthX's CTO to draft a detailed blog post
3.  Collaborate on refining the draft after GrowthX's due diligence period (2 weeks)
4.  Explore additional co-marketing options based on the initial case study
